Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendants To Plaintiffs Requests For Admission (Set One); And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-16-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF VI LUONG's Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendants To Plaintiffs Requests For Admission (Set One); And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion DENIED. Boilerplate objections are inappropriate and "may be sanctionable." Korea Data Systems Co. v. Sup. Ct. (1997) 51 Cal.App.4th 1513, 1516. General objections are still used so often that I am unwilling to find there was a misuse of the discovery process for what appears to ordinary (if frustrating) general objections that Defendant was ultimately willing to withdraw.

Order signed.
